name: Senior Strength
identity_statement: Senior Strength is built for moving heavy things. Joint-friendly loading, machine-assisted, balance integration. The Basics bias means exercises lean toward proven bilateral classics — barbell staples, bilateral over unilateral. You walk in, load up, execute the program, and leave stronger.

color_postures.⚫: Teaches barbell setup, loading sequence, and safety positions for heavy compound lifts
color_postures.🟢: Bodyweight strength check — does gym strength transfer? Advanced calisthenics apply
color_postures.🔵: Linear progression tracking — same weight, same reps, add load when form holds
color_postures.🟣: Single-rep quality at competition-relevant loads — bar path, timing, setup
color_postures.🔴: Heavy working sets with full recovery — push the ceiling, earn every rep
color_postures.🟠: Station rotation with implements — keep tissues trading under heavy demand
color_postures.🟡: Unconventional loading patterns — grip variations, odd positions, new challenges
color_postures.⚪: 4s eccentrics under moderate barbell load — tendon adaptation, breath-paced
